arts.sum: Ajax were close to appointing Potter and at one stage earlier this year, there seemed to be at an agreement with the former Chelsea and Brighton boss. Potter had taken over Thomas Tuchel at Chelsea but was unable to change the club's fortunes around, leaving with a lowly 38.71% win record.

arts.ttl: Chelsea put off by goalkeeper’s €80m asking price
arts.sum: Chelsea made multiple enquiries to sign AC Milan goalkeeper Mike Maignan in the summer but were put off by the player’s €80m (£66.7m) asking price. The West London side sought to sign a new first-choice goalkeeper in the summer after allowing Djordje Petrovic and Kepa Arrizabalaga to leave on loan. Maignan featured high on […] The post Chelsea put off by goalkeeper’s €80m asking price first appeared on The Football Faithful.

According to Italian outlet Corriere dello Sport, Chelsea enquired about Maignan’s availability on several occasions, but they were unable to agree a deal with Milan and the Frenchman stayed put at San Siro. Maignan is reportedly happy at Milan and he may even sign a contract extension at San Siro, as per Corriere dello Sport.

arts.ttl: 'I know about this' – Fabian Hurzeler could have last laugh after Todd Boehly's massive pay out to Brighton
arts.sum: Chelsea have paid more than £225 million to Brighton in recent seasons after raiding the Seagulls for players and staff

arts.ttl: 'Feels like I've never had an injury': £25m Chelsea player says he's the fittest he's been in two years
arts.sum: A player in Chelsea’s first-team squad has just explained that he’s feeling extremely sharp and the fittest he’s been in a couple of years. Chelsea...

arts.ttl: The £17.5m Chelsea transfer gift that gives Enzo Maresca an additional issue in 2025/26
arts.sum: Whereas it was confirmed back in June that Chelsea had agreed a deal to sign attacker Estevao from Brazilian side Palmeiras, the club announced 12 months earlier that Paez would move to west London from Independiente del Valle after his 18th birthday. The first part, which began in March and ended in June, was a memorable one for Paez and Independiente del Valle as they finished top of the 16-team league to advance to the finals and also qualify for the group stage of the Copa Libertadores in the process.

arts.ttl: Chelsea fans think they've found a Cobham gem after U21 display, one claimed he's a 'Jackson regen'
arts.sum: Many Chelsea fans think they've found the next Cobham star in the form of Shim Mheuka after his performances in the youth side.

arts.ttl: Chelsea embarrassingly forced players to 'sit on the floor' for meetings
arts.sum: A number of Chelsea stars were forced to sit on the floor during team meetings during Graham Potter's reign at Stamford Bridge, when a £300m spending spree meant that there weren't enough seats

arts.ttl: Brighton's new £25m signing spotted in training ahead of Chelsea and South American star seen after West Ham transfer link - gallery
arts.sum: Head coach Fabian Hurzeler prepares his Seagulls to take flight at Chelsea

arts.ttl: Romano reveals TRUTH about Chelsea rumour
arts.sum: Chelsea are not in active negotiations to sign RB Leipzig defender Castello Lukeba, according to transfer expert Fabrizio Romano. While Chelsea aren’t currently looking to sign Lukeba, as per Romano, the France U21 international has been linked with a sensational move to Real Madrid in recent weeks .
